title: PDF to Knowledge Markdown
subtitle: A static walkthrough of a document-understanding pipeline that turns product documentation into LLM-friendly Markdown, with Bedrock visual descriptions and diagnostics.
trustNote: Static demo using pre-generated sample outputs. No real documents are uploaded or processed on this page.

primarySample.label: Product documentation PDF
primarySample.description: A 32-page corporate accounts user manual processed through the Knowledge Markdown pipeline.
notes: 20 visual pages were described by Bedrock using page-level PDF fallback.
12 additional visual candidates were skipped by the configured visual-page limit.
The generated UTF-8 output was clean in local verification.

pipeline.title: PDF input
pipeline.description: Dense product or user documentation with headings, lists, tables, screenshots, and repeated page chrome.

pipeline.title: Deterministic extraction
pipeline.description: The parser builds a structured model with source pages, repeated-content cleanup, table candidates, and visual-page signals.

pipeline.title: Bedrock visual descriptions
pipeline.description: When embedded image bytes are unavailable, bounded single-page PDF fallback lets Bedrock describe visual page content.

pipeline.title: Knowledge Markdown
pipeline.description: The final Markdown keeps headings, source comments, visual descriptions, tables, and readable narrative close together.

pipeline.title: Diagnostics
pipeline.description: A separate quality report records selected pages, skipped pages, fallbacks, warnings, and extraction summary counts.

artifacts.label: knowledge.md

# Corporate Accounts User Manual

## Patchset Release 22.2.6.0.0
<!-- source: page 1 -->

### Figure: Page 1 visual content
<!-- source: page 1 -->

Corporate Accounts User Manual for a digital banking product release. The page identifies the guide, release number, part number, and publication month.

## Current & Savings Overview
<!-- source: page 7 -->

The account overview screen summarizes current and savings accounts, balances, quick links, offers, and account details available to the user.

artifacts.label: document.json
artifacts.description: The structured intermediate model before Markdown rendering.

artifacts.label: diagnostics.json
artifacts.description: The quality and warning report for the conversion.

demonstrates: Converts large documentation into a cleaner LLM knowledge artifact.
Keeps visual context near the related page or section instead of appending all notes at the end.
Produces structured intermediate JSON for inspection or alternate renderers.
Produces diagnostics so extraction quality is visible.
Keeps the public demo static; authenticated upload can be added later.
limits: This public page is static and does not accept uploads.
Visual page description is capped for cost and latency control.
Some complex table and layout extraction still needs a richer PDF backend.
A future authenticated version should add private uploads, job status, artifact expiry, per-user access control, and cost controls.
